failClosedPolicy: Consumers import RuntimeSession facade contracts, semantic readouts, and proposal shapes from this package root only. Ordinary project boot initializes unloaded and calls loadProject({ source }); loadEcrpProject and its handwritten topology DTOs are compatibility-only until Demo migration. Concrete bridge-backed construction routes through @asha/runtime-bridge rather than private transports or local authority.
pinningGuidance: Consumer evidence should record runtime-session.v0 plus the engine commit that provided the package.
